publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 166, folios 130-131. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: Dearest Mate. All well, but not much time. I could stay here a fortnight with advantage.
I have made the whole family laugh heartily with my witty fun about the chaotic nature of the establishment & proceedings. Old Crosse delights in my quizzing of him. The playful Bird, you know!!--
She is very harmless however, I assure you.
Young John Crosse is an excellent mathematician as well as metaphysician &c; & he works my brain famously
for he opposes everything I advance, intentionally; but with a perfect good humour.
This is very useful & good for me.
He will be an addition to my catalogue of useful & intellectual friends, in many respects.
I fully feel all you say, my dear, about order, system, &c.
Indeed, here I see an example of a total want of it, & how much much more might have been done had there been system & order.
Today is splendid, & we are all going to take a very long walk.
Satdy, which you mention as fine, was here a miserable cold raw fog.
Yesterday was middling, & we took a walk of 4 miles & back. Miss Crosse walks any distance, & at a tremendous rate.
It is a sad drawback that we breakfast about 11 o'clock; it loses full half the day.
There is no order. Every one straggles down when he pleases. You cannot conceive what an odd house it is altogether.
The post &c all is by chance, & at all sorts of hours.
I start on Weddy, for a 12 o'clock Train.
